title: Kannum Kannum Kollai Adithal Lyrics Thiruda Thiruda
stanzas: <div>Kannum Kannum Kollai Adithal Lyrics Thiruda Thiruda

[Kannum kannum kollaiyadithal
kadhal endru artham.
kadali vaanam kollaiyadithal
megam endru artham.

poovai vandu kollaiyadithal
pudhaiyal endru artham
pudhaiyal ennai kollaiyadithal
matcham endrey artham artham] (2)

paravaigal thondrinaal
nadhigal pakkam endru artham
paarkadal ponginaal
vaanil pournami endru artham

aalillaamal adikadi sirithaal.
.. endru artham
azhagu pennin thaayaar endral
athai endre artham artham

kadhal endru artham.

matcham endrey artham artham

thaavidum oadaigal nadhiyin
thangaigal endru artham.
thoovidum thooralgal
mazhaiyin tholigal endru artham

iravin meedhu vellai adithaal
vidiyal endru artham
edhiri paerai solli adithaal
vettri endre artham artham

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of Kannum Kannum Kollai Adithal?

The song metaphorically describes the act of stealing glances and hearts, symbolizing love and attraction.

Who composed the music for Thiruda Thiruda?

The music for Thiruda Thiruda was composed by A.R. Rahman.

What is the theme of the song?

The theme revolves around the beauty and excitement of love, expressed through poetic metaphors.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

When was the movie Thiruda Thiruda released?

The movie was released in the year 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kannum Kannum Kollai Adithal is a classic romantic melody from the movie Thiruda Thiruda, composed by A.R. Rahman. The song's lyrics, written by Vairamuthu, use beautiful metaphors to describe the nuances of love and attraction. Sung by Mano, it evokes a sense of longing and enchantment, making it a timeless favorite. The song perfectly captures the essence of romance, making it ideal for moments of reflection and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kannum Kannum Kollai Adithal from the movie Thiruda Thiruda is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and longing. Composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman, this song beautifully blends poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu with the soulful voice of Mano. Experience the magic of 90s Tamil cinema with this unforgettable classic.
stanzaMeanings: When eyes steal glances, it means love. When the sky steals the sea, it means clouds.
When a bee steals a flower, it means treasure. When treasure steals me, it means a mark.
When birds fly, it means towards the river. When the sea rises, it means a full moon in the sky.
When someone laughs often without reason, it means beauty. If you call a beautiful woman a mother, it means the same.
When eyes steal glances, it means love. When the sky steals the sea, it means clouds.
When a bee steals a flower, it means treasure. When treasure steals me, it means a mark.
When eyes steal glances, it means love.
When boats float, it means the river's gold. When raindrops fall, it means the rain's shoulders.
When white spreads over the night, it means dawn. When you call out an enemy's name, it means victory.
When eyes steal glances, it means love. When the sky steals the sea, it means clouds.
When a bee steals a flower, it means treasure. When treasure steals me, it means a mark.
